Class DRDesignThermometerPlot

java.lang.Object
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.chart.plot.AbstractDesignBasePlot
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.chart.plot.DRDesignAxisPlot
ch.unibas.medizin.dynamicreports.design.base.chart.plot.DRDesignThermometerPlot
All Implemented Interfaces:
DRIDesignAxisPlot, DRIDesignBasePlot, DRIDesignPlot, DRIDesignThermometerPlot, Serializable
public class DRDesignThermometerPlot extends DRDesignAxisPlot implements DRIDesignThermometerPlot

DRDesignThermometerPlot class.

Author:
Ricardo Mariaca
